---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

[Download as PDF →](CV_YanX.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-dark target="_blank"}

<br>

<object data="CV_YanX.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #e5e2dc;">
  <p>Your browser doesn't support inline PDFs. <a href="CV_YanX.pdf" target="_blank">Download the CV instead</a>.</p>
</object>
